content.text:
[cron:investment-research-background-preopen-0840 08:40来福投研会-盘前值班] 执行以下任务：
1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace
2. 运行 python3 scripts/run_investment_research_background_cycle.py --cycle pre_open
3. 读取 cycle md/json 输出
4. 用中文简短汇报：当前风险状态、优先候选、值班角色、周期总览文件路径
5. 非交易时段不要给可执行买价，只给方向、优先级和触发条件
Current time: Wednesday, April 1st, 2026 — 8:40 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-01 00:40 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
